nasb.text: They called the name of the city Dan, after the name of Dan their father who was born in Israel; however, the name of the city formerly was Laish.

esv.text: And they named the city Dan, after the name of Dan their ancestor, who was born to Israel; but the name of the city was Laish at the first.

cnv.text: 按著他們的祖宗，以色列所生的兒子但的名字，給那城起名叫但；其實那城原先的名字叫拉億。

ccb.text: 这座城原来叫拉亿，他们用祖先以色列的儿子但的名字为该城重新命名。
